free_text: Photodisintegration of light and medium-weight nuclei
at intermediate energies - IV photoproduction of 7Be
11C from targets with masses up to 40.
Target  samples consisted of doron, lithium, amide and
lithium  chloride  powders, respectively,  packed  in
thin  walled  lucite  containers,  with  a density of
about 10**21 target per square ctntimetre. The purity
of the samples were not less than 99.9%.
Special technique allowed to register tracks produced
by fragments with high ionization power only.
Data were compiled at the Russia MSU SINP
